"yiTT, 3T8R lrf*W MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 20th May, 1996 G.S.R 221(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (i) of Section 10 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988), the Central Government hereby specially empowers the Secretary, Department of Revenue, Government of India for the purpose of the said Section. [F. No. 820/8/96-PITNDPS] R. K.
